question: From these maps, what can be concluded about which type of unemployment is higher across U.S. states overall?

options.A: Youth unemployment tends to be higher than overall unemployment across states
options.B: Overall unemployment tends to be higher than youth unemployment across states
options.C: Youth and overall unemployment have very similar levels in every state
options.D: It cannot be determined from these maps alone which type of unemployment is higher overall

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Youth Unemployment has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
